posts.content: I used to believe this and then I saw the budget requested for a traditional chemistry grant.

I voluntarily read plenty of LLM output, but there should be consent. My default assumption when I read text is it reflects a human's thoughts, and it gives me the ick to realize half a line in that it doesn't.

interestSummary: Naomi Saphra is focused on understanding and improving training dynamics for NLP models, particularly how structures and mechanistic behaviors emerge. Her recent activity also shows engagement with the academic conference circuit and criticism of publishing logistics and the ethics of undisclosed AI-generated text.
